title: Homelab Infrastructure Monitoring Stack
description: A full observability stack using Prometheus, Grafana, Alertmanager, Docker, and Caddy to monitor Pi-hole traffic and multi-host system metrics with automated alerts and backups.

title: EuroShots 2024 Football Data Analysis
description: A Python and Pandas analysis project focused on Euro 2024 shot statistics, player shooting efficiency, and team trends with Matplotlib and Seaborn visualizations.

title: Restaurant Sales & Menu Insights
description: Operational data work supporting restaurant teams with customer behavior, sales trend analysis, and menu performance insights for leadership decision-making.

title: UX Testing & Product Refinement
description: UX/UI work using usability testing, A/B testing, and cross-functional feedback to refine digital product experiences and improve user engagement.

title: JAM Construction Estimation Workflow
description: Business process and estimation workflow support for a construction startup, focused on clearer project estimates and pipeline organization.
